title: Malfu Simple Animation
description: animation resourcepack for serious player animation or animation overhaul.
body:
just some **animation resourcepack for _serious player animation_ and _animation overhaul_.**

currently only running, walking, and walking backward (only for serious player animation, because animation overhaul don't have it on their source)

**Version 3:** (currently only for serious player animation)

Trying to make it less goofy. currently only running, walking and walking backward. **you can override V2 with V3 if you want the other animation from V2.**

**Version 2:**

only for **Serious Player Animation**.
running, walking, walking backward, climbing, crawling, sword, axe, pickaxe, shovel animation.

if you use **Serious Player Animation with Not Enough Animation**. make sure to turn off Not Enough Animation climbing and crawling animation in config/notenoughanimation.json to use my crawling and climbing animation.

i made it fit with better combat pose, so it wouldn't look weird when on pose animation.


here is the demo

Version 1 (Run & Walk Only):
